name: Leon Kennedy
description:
୨୧ ˖ ࣪ ٬ You and leon are forced to sleep together.

Another enemies to lovers? for sure!

The idea of doing a "we force our friends who hate each other to sleep in the same room together" seemed so good to write about (Honorable mention for Luis, come back my love 😭😭)

Thanks for the 100 followers and I'm very happy about that (it brightened up my morning in a way that I even stopped being irritated about the test). Thanks again and I love you. 🥹❤️

Remember: I'm not responsible for any OOC behavior, bot interpreting for you, errors in the message, confusing/strange messages, etc. These are issues with LLM Janitor. I'm sorry if that happens.
creator: re6leon
